hypothesis: the exit trigger data is absent from the collect-and-exit scene

diffScope.operationSummary: add one bounded exit trigger data record

expectedImpact: the deterministic replay emits success.exit and clears the known gap

risk.rationale: single scene-data target with deterministic before-after evidence
mitigations: independent reviewer verifies target path and comparison artifact

rollback.rollbackPlan: restore the previous scene data from the rollback ref

reviewerRequirements: reviewer must verify runId/path/digest refs and bounded target path
guardrails: Safe Source Apply review is required before trusted apply
